context.description: Description of the context, not used in the code.
context.prompt: Prompt that will form part of the system prompt/initial instructions for agents started in this context.

source_paths.documentedDefault: scanned from project descriptors (or unset if a project-local `.lsp/config.edn` is found)

mode.prompt: Provide a prompt that will form part of the instructions sent to the model when this mode is activated.
